title: Decision
doc_html:
§55. Decision

            A board shall provide an applicant with a written decision regarding his application within sixty days after receiving a completed application.

            Acts 2024, No. 253, §1; Acts 2024, No. 568, §1.
doc_text:
§55. Decision
A board shall provide an applicant with a written decision regarding his application
within sixty days after receiving a completed application.
Acts 2024, No. 253, §1; Acts 2024, No. 568, §1.
